options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: difficulty
options.description: Adjusts the overall difficulty of the randomizer, including upgrades required to defeat bosses and advanced movement tricks or glitches.

options.name: penitence
options.description: Allows one of the three Penitences to be chosen at the beginning of the game.

options.name: starting_location
options.description:
Choose where to start the randomizer. Note that some starting locations cannot be chosen with certain other options.

Specifically, Brotherhood and Mourning And Havoc cannot be chosen if Shuffle Dash is enabled, and Grievance Ascends cannot be chosen if Shuffle Wall Climb is enabled.

options.name: ending
options.description:
Choose which ending is required to complete the game.

Talking to Tirso in Albero will tell you the selected ending for the current game.

Ending A: Collect all thorn upgrades.

Ending C: Collect all thorn upgrades and the Holy Wound of Abnegation.

options.name: thorn_shuffle
options.description: Shuffles the Thorn given by Deogracias and all Thorn upgrades into the item pool.

options.name: reliquary_shuffle
options.description: Adds the True Torment exclusive Reliquary rosary beads into the item pool.

options.name: death_link
options.description:
When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

    Note that Guilt Fragments will not appear when killed by death link.

options.name: prie_dieu_warp
options.description: Automatically unlocks the ability to warp between Prie Dieu shrines.

options.name: skip_cutscenes
options.description: Automatically skips most cutscenes.

options.name: corpse_hints
options.description: Changes the 34 corpses in game to give various hints about item locations.

options.name: skip_long_quests
options.description:
Ensures that the rewards for long quests will be filler items.

Affected locations: "Albero: Donate 50000 Tears", "Ossuary: 11th reward", "AtTotS: Miriam's gift", "TSC: Jocinero's final reward"

options.name: start_wheel
options.description: Changes the beginning gift to The Young Mason's Wheel.

options.name: dash_shuffle
options.description: Turns the ability to dash into an item that must be found in the multiworld.

options.name: wall_climb_shuffle
options.description: Turns the ability to climb walls with your sword into an item that must be found in the multiworld.

options.name: boots_of_pleading
options.description:
Adds the custom relic Boots of Pleading into the item pool, which grants the ability to fall onto spikes and survive.

Must have the "Boots of Pleading" mod installed to connect to a multiworld.

options.name: purified_hand
options.description:
Adds the custom relic Purified Hand of the Nun into the item pool, which grants the ability to jump a second time in mid-air.

Must have the "Double Jump" mod installed to connect to a multiworld.

options.name: skill_randomizer
options.description: Randomizes the abilities from the skill tree into the item pool.

options.name: enemy_randomizer
options.description:
Randomizes the enemies that appear in each room.

Shuffled: Enemies will be shuffled amongst each other, but can only appear as many times as they do in a standard game.

Randomized: Every enemy is completely random, and can appear any number of times.

Some enemies will never be randomized.

options.name: enemy_groups
options.description:
Randomized enemies will be chosen from sets of specific groups. 

(Weak, normal, large, flying)

Has no effect if Enemy Randomizer is disabled.

options.name: enemy_scaling
options.description:
Randomized enemies will have their stats increased or decreased depending on the area they appear in.

Has no effect if Enemy Randomizer is disabled.
